meta.siteDescription: AI-Powered Website Analysis Platform - Scan, review, and optimize any website with artificial intelligence
meta.siteKeywords: website review, AI analysis, SEO audit, broken links, website scanner

hero.title: Analyze Any Website with AI Intelligence
hero.subtitle: Get comprehensive website reviews, SEO audits, broken link scans, and AI-powered insights in seconds. Trusted by developers and marketers worldwide.

features.sectionSubtitle: Powerful tools to analyze, review, and optimize websites
features.aiReviewDesc: 10-step automated analysis with AI-powered content summarization and screenshot capture across multiple viewports
features.brokenLinksDesc: Detect and report all broken links on any website with detailed HTTP status codes and recommendations
features.seoAuditDesc: Extract metadata, Open Graph tags, Twitter Cards, and get actionable SEO recommendations
features.screenshotDesc: Multi-viewport screenshots with desktop, tablet, and mobile previews for responsive testing
features.apiDesc: RESTful API with consistent response format, API key authentication, and webhook support
features.batchDesc: Process 10+ URLs per minute with intelligent rate limiting and queue management

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: Three simple steps to get comprehensive website analysis
howItWorks.step1Desc: Paste any website URL into the analysis tool
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI engine performs a 10-step deep analysis
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive detailed reports with actionable insights

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more power.
